title: stelis vigoris
intro: Stelis vigoris, also known as the Tiger Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Stelis vigoris include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
